name: Summer Patio Carousel
aesthetic: Playful pastel summer — pink/teal/yellow color blocks, tropical leaves, lemons, handwritten 'Hello Summer' script, dotted decoration.

fonts.sans_display: Montserrat 800 (UPPERCASE labels: HELLO, SUMMER SALES, TODAY ONLY)

slides.subject: Full photo of the patio / exterior on left half, pink block on right with 'Hello Summer' + offer.
slides.decor: Monstera leaves top-right, lemons, dotted cluster

slides.subject: Drink/cocktail photo inside a pink-framed square centered on teal-over-pink split background.
slides.decor: Leaves right, lemons scattered, dotted cluster bottom-left

slides.subject: Top half = pink block with 'Hello Summer MENU'; bottom half = full-bleed food photo.
slides.decor: Leaves and lemons in the pink band

slides.subject: Left = pool/rooftop/patio lifestyle photo in pink frame; right = pink block with 'Hello Summer' + neighbourhood pill.
Static BiteMap closer (dark). Matches other templates for brand consistency.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'find it on' / BiteMap logo / tagline / app badges

slide1.offer: short offer line, UPPERCASE (e.g. 'PATIO NOW OPEN', 'SUMMER HOURS LIVE')

copy_rules: Script word is always 'Summer' — do not substitute
Label line (HELLO / SUMMER SIPS / SUMMER SALES) is UPPERCASE, wide tracking
Offer/pill lines are short — 3 words max
Restaurant name goes in handle pill (@handle), never in the big script word
Neighbourhood optional, appears only in slide 4 pill or meta
asset_rules: Photos should feel sunlit / outdoor / warm — avoid dim interior shots
Patio, rooftop, pool-adjacent, bright drink, or bright dish imagery only
Min 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
Drink slide: photograph the actual menu drink, not stock cocktails
use_when: Summer events tie-in (concerts, festivals, World Cup summer fan zones)
